1.1: Cells are the basic unit of life. They are called the building blocks of us! Basically, they are the reason we exist! We have over thousands of cells around our body, they build tissues, which we will discuss on the next topic.
1.2: A) Every living thing is made of cells
1.3: B) Cells are the basic unit of life
1.4: C) Cells come from pre-existing cells
1.6: TYPE OF CELLS inside our body
1.7:
Red blood cells
* Also called erythrocyte
* Cells that transport oxygen to the lungs and release carbon dioxide from the lungs.
* Without erythrocytes, we cannot function the respiratory system and lead to your sad death.
1.8:
White blood cells
* Also called leukocytes
* Fights infections and diseases to protect your human body.
* Without leukocytes, we could get sick easily and eventually and probably would lead to a sad death.
